target_market_label.en: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines (SVGBS / VINLEC)
target_market_label.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯（SVGBS / VINLEC）
target_market_label.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯（SVGBS / VINLEC）

title.en: China-to-Saint Vincent and the Grenadines BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入圣文森特和格林纳丁斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入聖文森特和格林納丁斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Saint Vincent and the Grenadines SVGBS standards-body requirements, energy-portfolio ministry oversight, VINLEC grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 international safety standards expected in project specifications, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation framework, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and Saint Vincent and the Grenadines 230/400 V 50 Hz grid and tropical maritime environment — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与圣文森特和格林纳丁斯SVGBS标准机构要求、能源主管部委公用事业监管要求、VINLEC并网要求、项目规格中预期的IEC 62619和IEC 63056国际安全标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装框架、UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输要求，以及圣文森特和格林纳丁斯230/400 V 50 Hz电网和热带海洋环境——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與聖文森特和格林納丁斯SVGBS標準機構要求、能源主管部委公用事業監管要求、VINLEC併網要求、項目規格中預期的IEC 62619和IEC 63056國際安全標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝框架、UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸要求，以及聖文森特和格林納丁斯230/400 V 50 Hz電網和熱帶海洋環境——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SVGBS conformity scope determination, energy-portfolio ministry approval, VINLEC grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Saint Vincent and the Grenadines SVGBS mandatory standards, energy-portfolio ministry requirements, VINLEC grid-connection technical specifications, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines building authority fire-safety requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SVGBS合格评定范围裁定、能源主管部委监管批准、VINLEC并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行圣文森特和格林纳丁斯SVGBS强制标准、能源主管部委能源监管要求、VINLEC并网技术规格、圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑主管机关消防安全要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SVGBS合格評定範圍裁定、能源主管部委監管批准、VINLEC併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行聖文森特和格林納丁斯SVGBS強制標準、能源主管部委能源監管要求、VINLEC併網技術規格、聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築主管機關消防安全要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines operate primarily under IEC international standards referenced in VINLEC interconnection agreements, energy-portfolio ministry oversight, and NFPA-referenced fire-safety requirements. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Saint Vincent and the Grenadines are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for VINLEC project acceptance — Chinese GB 44240-2024 alone is not sufficient; (2) IEC 63056 system-level battery safety requirements where referenced in project specifications; (3) VINLEC grid-connection approval and energy-portfolio ministry oversight including re-parameterisation and retesting of PCS for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines 230/400 V 50 Hz grid — note that although China and Saint Vincent and the Grenadines both use 50 Hz, the voltage differs (China is 220/380 V); (4) fire-safety installation approval from the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority under an NFPA 855-aligned framework, combined with hurricane wind-load and tropical salt-mist corrosion design requirements; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation and IEC 62281 compliance mandatory for sea freight via Kingstown under the IMDG Code; and (6) tropical maritime environment derating for salt mist, high humidity, and sustained high ambient temperature. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in VINLEC, ministry, or project-owner review.
answer_first.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯的BESS项目主要依据VINLEC并网协议、能源主管部委监管及基于NFPA的消防安全要求中引用的IEC国际标准运作。中国BESS出口圣文森特和格林纳丁斯的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为VINLEC项目验收的国际预期基准——仅持有中国GB 44240-2024认证不足；（2）项目规格中引用的IEC 63056系统级电池安全要求；（3）VINLEC和能源主管部委并网批准，包括针对圣文森特和格林纳丁斯230/400 V 50 Hz电网对PCS进行重新参数配置和重新测试——注意尽管中国与圣文森特和格林纳丁斯同为50 Hz，但电压不同（中国为220/380 V）；（4）圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局在NFPA 855框架下的消防安全安装审批，结合飓风风荷载和热带盐雾腐蚀设计要求；（5）依据IMDG规则经金斯敦港海运所强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件和IEC 62281合规；（6）针对盐雾、高湿度和持续高环境温度的热带海洋环境降额。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在VINLEC、能源主管部委或项目业主审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。聖文森特和格林納丁斯的BESS項目主要依據VINLEC併網協議、能源主管部委監管及基於NFPA的消防安全要求中引用的IEC國際標準運作。中國BESS出口聖文森特和格林納丁斯的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為VINLEC項目驗收的國際預期基準——僅持有中國GB 44240-2024認證不足；（2）項目規格中引用的IEC 63056系統級電池安全要求；（3）VINLEC和能源主管部委併網批准，包括針對聖文森特和格林納丁斯230/400 V 50 Hz電網對PCS進行重新參數配置和重新測試——注意儘管中國與聖文森特和格林納丁斯同為50 Hz，但電壓不同（中國為220/380 V）；（4）聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局在NFPA 855框架下的消防安全安裝審批，結合颶風風荷載和熱帶鹽霧腐蝕設計要求；（5）依據IMDG規則經金斯敦港海運所強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件和IEC 62281合規；（6）針對鹽霧、高濕度和持續高環境溫度的熱帶海洋環境降額。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在VINLEC、能源主管部委或項目業主審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
